product.name: VONLUCE Semi Flush Mount Ceiling Light, 13.8" Ceiling Light Fixture with Clear Glass Shade, E26 Base, 3-Bulb Industrial Lighting Fixture for Hallway Entryway Bedroom, Brushed Nickel, ETL Certificated
features: Modern Ceiling Light: Vonluce’s semi-flush mount light pairs a sleek brushed nickel canopy with a clear glass shade, adding a modern touch to your decor. It provides bright, unobstructed illumination, creating an open and inviting atmosphere in your room

Standard E26 Bases: The E26 bases of our farmhouse ceiling light support any CFL, LED, or incandescent light bulb (not incl.) rated up to 60W and are dimmer compatible for precise control over brightness and intensity

Glow Anywhere: With its crystal-clear glass shade, our 13.8 x 11 inch light fixture delivers maximum light output, providing bright, unobstructed illumination in your bedroom, living room, dining room, kitchen, or hallway

Install in Minutes: Our flush mount light fixture comes with all mounting hardware. Once your wiring is ready, the clear design and easy-to-follow instructions will guide you through a quick installation

Illuminate with Confidence: Vonluce's ceiling light fixture combines sturdy metal and durable glass to ensure lasting beauty. The enclosed bulb housing design ensures the safety of your bulbs while maintaining a sleek appearance

Color Variation Notice: Slight color variations may occur due to material batches, manufacturing processes, or display settings. These are normal and do not impact quality. Thank you for your understanding
